description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named Phing (using the default stage). The job runs the shell command ./gitlab-ci/bootstrap.sh, caches the vendor/ directory with untracked files, and publishes the build/phpunit-coverage/ and build/pdepend/ directories as artifacts. It should be scheduled on runners tagged php71 and composer. No specific Docker image or services are defined, and no additional variables or rules are required.
